spoilers.title: Watsuki is chosen by Shueisha, Shonen Jump comapany, as a judge for Tezuka Award in 2026.🥺 Watsuki's message: Looking forward to seeing an overflowing passion, ‘This is what I love.’ Drawing and stor
spoilers.text: Watsuki is chosen by Shueisha, Shonen Jump comapany, as a judge for Tezuka Award in 2026.🥺 Watsuki's message: Looking forward to seeing an overflowing passion, ‘This is what I love.’ Drawing and storytelling skills can be taught after your debut, but passion is only yours.🥰

misc.title: #ONEPIECE1175 The conflict, the stand Sun God Nika opposed, it is even pretty clear to me, Luffy already made the answer. And this is also a reason why I think Loki vs Luffy gonna happening soon. BigB
misc.text: #ONEPIECE1175 The conflict, the stand Sun God Nika opposed, it is even pretty clear to me, Luffy already made the answer. And this is also a reason why I think Loki vs Luffy gonna happening soon. BigBoy (@big10_boy) #ONEPIECE I noticed something: 対立した (tairitsu shita) means "opposed," "conflicted," or "confronted." It carries a nuance in Japanese; it means a clash of ideologies and their beliefs were polarized. Nika vs the War God fought in the lowest level of Elbaph (realm of dead) — https://nitter.net/big10_boy/status/2028302065747783909#m

misc.title: Unlike TCB’s English translation (1st pic), in Japanese version it is clear that Zoro is NOT responding with full confidence to Luffy’s statement that they’re safe as long as he’s there.😭😭😭 In othe
misc.text: Unlike TCB’s English translation (1st pic), in Japanese version it is clear that Zoro is NOT responding with full confidence to Luffy’s statement that they’re safe as long as he’s there.😭😭😭 In other words, Zoro understands that he is facing formidable opponents.🔥
